codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds the POST /products/:id/mint endpoint and the chain plugin, perfectly implementing the mock minting logic as specified.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test files sharing the same database and using beforeEach cleanup hooks can experience foreign key violations if run concurrently. Setting fileParallelism: false in vitest.config.ts resolves this. This should be documented as a testing convention.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker added `fileParallelism: false` to apps/api/vitest.config.ts and mentioned it in handoff.discoveredIssues.

summary: Code review passed. Implementation meets all requirements and cleanly implements mock minting and chain plugin fallback.
